templates.name: When will I get points for the order I placed?
templates.content: After you've placed your order, it takes 3-5 business days for points to appear in your account.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at hello@igkhair.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at hello@igkhair.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: It is our priority to get your order to you as fast as possible and for this reason, we're unfortunately, unable to cancel or edit an order once it has been placed. Apologies for any inconvenience this might cause!

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We usually ship via FedEx and once shipped it will take 3-8 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://igk.attn.tv/axy9nYmUJ_sA and you can start your return here: https://igk.attn.tv/aH0gIgMKczx0

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on orders over $40 in the continental United States. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can learn more and apply for our affiliate program here: https://www.igkhair.com/pages/affiliate-sign-up-influencer

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/igkhair/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/IGKhair

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://www.igkhair.com/pages/store-locator

templates.name: Do your products contain mineral oils?
templates.content: No, our products do not contain mineral oil.

templates.name: Do you have samples?
templates.content: Though we do not have samples available on our website at this time, our products are available at Sephora and Ulta where in-store samples are offered.

templates.name: Do your products contain silicone?
templates.content: Yes, some products do contain silicones.

templates.name: Do I apply IGL color to wet or dry hair?
templates.content: IGK Color is applied to dry hair. When hair is wet, the excess water can dilute the color giving you uneven color results.

templates.name: What do the numbers and letters mean on the color box?
templates.content: It's how we designate the characteristics of our shades. The number defines the level or depth in the shade (aka the lightness/darkness of a shade) and is designated with 1 being black, and 10 being the lightest blonde. The letters directly following the number identify the tone or tones. The first letter is the dominant tone, and the second letter is the supporting tone. Here's an example: 5GM (Brown, Gold, Mahogany).

templates.name: Can I add a discount code to a subscription order?
templates.content: I'm afraid not, subscriptions are already discounted at 15%.

templates.name: What are the ingredients for each shade?
templates.content: You can see the full list of ingredients here: https://www.igkhair.com/pages/color-ingredients

templates.name: Why are your products formulated without sodium chloride?
templates.content: Apart from IGK Color, our products are formulated without Sodium Chloride because it's known to strip color and shorten the life of keratin treatments.

templates.name: Where is IGK Color made?
templates.content: IGK Color is made in Italy and professionally packaged right here in the USA. We concepted and designed IGK Color alongside master colorists in our professional salons to bring the shades to life.

templates.name: Can I use IGK color while I’m pregnant or breastfeeding?
templates.content: While our products are free from harsh chemicals, it's always recommended that you consult with your physician before using any new product while pregnant.

templates.name: My hair has been chemically treated (permed, relaxed, chemically etc.). Can I still use IGK color?
templates.content: If your hair has been chemically treated with a perm, it's always recommended to perform a strand test prior to use to ensure desired color results. Permanently waved hair may absorb color differently than non-permed hair. If you have relaxed hair, we recommend you do not use IGK Color.

templates.name: Do I have to use everything in the kit?
templates.content: The kit is designed with everything you need to create salon-quality hair color at home. It's like having a professional colorist on demand. To achieve the best results, we advise using everything in your kit as directed.

templates.name: What is Good Behavior 4 in 1 prep spray and how to use it?
templates.content:
It's a multitasking detangler and blow-dry prep spray that provides 24-hour frizz 
control, 450° F heat protection, shine, smoothness, and softness. Spray it evenly onto clean, damp hair in sections and comb through. Follow with your favorite styler and blow dry.

templates.name: How many days do I have to wait to shampoo after coloring my hair?
templates.content: It's best to wait two days before returning to your regular haircare routine. The formula is permanent, and the color results will last up to 30 shampoos.

templates.name: Is IGK color a clean color formula?
templates.content: We formulated IGK Color as clean as possible by omitting harsh ingredients like parabens, phthalates, sulfates, and known allergens like PPD and resorcinol.

templates.name: How does IGK color reduce breakage by 44%?
templates.content: We formulated IGK Color with a blend of conditioning agents, humectants, and strengthening agents. This specialty blend ensures hair remains supple and hydrated, fortifying hair against damage caused during the coloring process.

templates.name: Are your products safe to use with keratin treatments?
templates.content: Yes, because our products are formulated without SLS and SLES, they should be safe to use on keratin-treated hair.

templates.name: What fragrances are used in your products?
templates.content: We use seven different fragrances across the line, each one emoting a feel for different cities and neighborhoods.

templates.name: If I have long hair, how many boxes of color do I need?
templates.content: IGK Color contains enough product to completely cover thin-medium shoulder-length hair. However, if your hair is exceptionally long or thick and you are coloring your whole head for the first time, you will need two boxes to ensure that you have sufficient product. If you have long, thick hair and are coloring the roots only, not the lengths, one box will be more than enough.

templates.name: Are your products paraben free?
templates.content: Yes, our products are formulated without parabens.

templates.name: Can I have multiple products on a subscription?
templates.content: Absolutely! You can add as many products as you would like to your subscription, but please note that not all products have the same delivery cadence - subscription delivery cadences vary between 30, 60, and 90 days. If you would like to alter the delivery cadence of any subscription, or synchronize the delivery dates, you can check out the account portal for your subscription information.

templates.name: Do I need to perform an allergy test?
templates.content: Yes, it's recommended that you perform an allergy test prior to coloring your hair. While IGK Color is free of harsh chemicals, it's always best to perform a strand test when using a new hair product to ensure you're not allergic to any ingredients found in the formula.

templates.name: When will I receive my refund?
templates.content: Generally, the processing time for refunds is 7 to 10 full business days from the time your package is received. We will notify you of the status of your return by e-mail.

templates.name: Is it normal to feel tingling?
templates.content: Tingling is a common occurrence when coloring your hair. If it becomes uncomfortable, then rinse your hair immediately. An aggressive itching feeling or irritation means you may be allergic to hair color. In this case, an alternative such as IGK Color depositing masks may be a good solution to adjust tone and add shine without irritation.

templates.name: Can I change how often my subscription arrives?
templates.content: Yes! We are committed to the highest levels of service for our subscribers. All subscribers can change the frequency of a subscription at any time by logging into their account and clicking Manage Subscription in the bottom left corner.

templates.name: Can I use IGK color if I have eczema?
templates.content: If you're suffering a breakout, it's best to wait before applying color. Unfortunately, the chemistry of the color can exacerbate eczema and lead to inflammation.

templates.name: Are your products color safe?
templates.content: Yes, our products should not contribute to color fading.

templates.name: Can I take my brunette hair to blonde with IGK color?
templates.content: IGK Color is not designed to take your hair color more than two levels lighter. If you have previously colored your hair, IGK Color can help enhance your hair color or take your hair darker. But, IGK Color cannot lighten your previously colored hair.

templates.name: Do I need to have clean hair before applying IGK color?
templates.content: It's best to apply IGK Color to hair that has been washed one to two days prior rather than freshly cleaned strands. Your scalp's natural sebum establishes a protective color barrier to ensure your hair is colored versus your scalp. However, if you have dry shampoo, temporary color or other styling products on your hair it is best to wash your hair before applying IGK Color to ensure the best results.

templates.name: Can I use IGK color if I’ve used a keratin smoothing treatment?
templates.content: Yes, IGK color is safe to use post keratin treatment. We recommend you also refer to the Keratin Treatment manufacturer's directions to ensure the best color results.

templates.name: Do your products contain phthalates?
templates.content: No, our products do not contain phthalates.

templates.name: Why is squalane included in the color formula?
templates.content: Squalane, derived from sugar cane, is a well-known and favored ingredient typically found in skincare products. We found this plant-based ingredient also works wonders for your hair health. It's super emollient and effortlessly rehydrates, replenishes, and protects hair from future damage. Plus, ours is sustainably sourced.

templates.name: How do I determine the % of gray in my hair?
templates.content:
Finding your % of gray is actually pretty simple. First, stand a few feet in front of the mirror with indirect light. Then, use the below as your guide:

- Less than 30% gray: less gray than natural color
- 50% gray: equal parts gray and natural color
- 75% gray: predominately gray with a touch of natural color
- 100% gray: all you see is gray

templates.name: When do I start my processing time?
templates.content: Processing time should begin after you've finished applying color to all sections. Removing your color too early can negatively impact the outcome.

templates.name: What makes IGK color different?
templates.content: IGK Color is the first at-home color formulated with the highest level of clean ingredients. IGK Color delivers superior color brilliance and wearability for all hair types and textures. It's formulated without known allergens like PPD and resorcinol. It's free from ammonia, fragrance, phthalates, parabens, and gluten. You get salon-worthy colors that expertly camouflages non-pigmented hair, lightens, darkens, and can change tones. Plus, IGK color also provides intense conditioning, protection, and shine while effortlessly coloring each strand.

templates.name: Are your products tested on animals?
templates.content: No, we do not test on animals and we're Leaping Bunny certified.

templates.name: My hair is darker than I anticipated. How can I fix it?
templates.content: You can use a detoxifying shampoo such as First Class Charcoal Detox Shampoo after coloring your hair, up to 48 hours, which may remove some of the freshly applied color. However, you should not try and use another color to change the tone. We recommend consulting with a salon professional to discuss next steps and the best, safest approach for your hair.

templates.name: How can IGK color deliver 15x shine?
templates.content: We think fresh color looks best on shiny hair, so we made sure to include conditioning agents like orchid extract in our color, plus a shine-enhancing clear treatment mask to close the cuticle layer and seal in color. When used together, IGK Color can deliver 15x the shine.

templates.name: Are your products safe to use on extensions?
templates.content: Due to the variety of extensions and bonding agents on the market, we recommend that you consult with your stylist before using different products on your extensions.

templates.name: Why is orchid extract included in the color formula?
templates.content: Orchid Extract is a natural moisturizer, a brilliant hair protector, and guards against chemical damage, heat, and UV exposure.

templates.name: Do I need to do something different to treat color-resistant gray hair?
templates.content:
There are a few tips for ensuring your resistant grays are effectively camouflaged:

- Adjust the processing time from 35 minutes to 45 minutes
- Apply color to the most resistant area first (typically around hairline and top of head), then follow with the other sections as directed
- Circle back and reapply more color to the resistant area after all other sections are complete for additional color saturation

templates.name: What is the difference between permanent color, demi-permanent color, semi-permanent color, and temporary color?
templates.content:
While they sound a lot alike, there's a distinct difference between each kind of hair color. Temporary color is exactly as it sounds: temporary. The color sits on top of the hair cuticle and is washed away with water or shampoo. Think sprays, hair chalk etc. Semi-Permanent color is developed with a single product, so you don't need to mix it with an oxidizer. The color is applied directly to the hair and then processed for 20 - 30 minutes, sometimes using heat. The results gradually fade over time and will generally last for 7 - 10 shampoos. 

Demi-permanent color is a 2-part system that uses a dye pigment mixed with a low volume oxidizer. The low volume oxidizer limits the amount of color change, so the results are long-lasting but not necessarily permanent. Permanent color is, well, just that. It's a 2-part system that uses a dye pigment and oxidizer, which is usually a solution of hydrogen peroxide. When the two parts combine, the mixture both removes some of the hair's natural pigment molecules and deposits the desired color molecules which changes the color of the hair permanently.

templates.name: Is IGK Color vegan?
templates.content: Yes, our color is created without using animal-derived ingredients.

templates.name: The color coming out of the tube is slightly discolored. Is it okay to use?
templates.content: It's perfectly normal for the tone to be slightly discolored when you first squeeze the product out of the tube. When color is exposed to oxygen the oxidative dyes can adjust slightly, but it will not negatively impact your color results.

templates.name: Can I use hair color if I have a sunburned scalp?
templates.content: It will generally take upwards of 3 - 5 days for your scalp to heal after a sunburn. Be sure the inflammation and redness have dissipated before applying any hair color. The overall pH of the formula can irritate your scalp and make the experience unpleasant. As a rule, if your scalp feels uncomfortable, do not color your hair. Wait until your scalp returns to normal.

templates.name: I have highlights. Can I use IGK color to touch them up?
templates.content: IGK color is not designed for retouching highlights, however, it can help to alleviate the appearance of darker roots. Lightening natural regrowth by one or two levels can soften the look of grown-out highlights.

templates.name: My hair is lighter than I anticipated. How can I fix it?
templates.content: That's an easy fix. It can be as simple as moving one shade darker than your original selection. Or, if you want to try a different tone, the IGK Color Consultation Tool can assist in finding a complimentary shade: https://www.igkhair.com/pages/color-quiz

templates.name: Will IGK color stain my sink and towels?
templates.content: Yes, IGK Color is permanent hair color and can stain your sink, clothes, and towels. We suggest using older or darker-colored towels to cover your neck and shoulders and using them when washing and rinsing the color away. For sinks, bathtubs, and counters, household materials like bathroom cleaner plus a sponge can help eliminate stains that may occur during color application.

templates.name: How do I determine my natural color level?
templates.content: First, determine if you have brown, blonde, red, or black hair. From there, we'll determine the "depth" of your color. For example, if you're a brunette, are you on the lighter side of the brown shade or the darker side leaning towards black? You can reference our color chart here: https://prnt.sc/uOUy_GkQ0dPw

templates.name: How does IGK color deliver 88% softer/smoother strands?
templates.content: Our naturally derived squalane extract helps to smooth and soften hair. It is highly emollient and helps to rehydrate hair, replenish the natural moisture balance and protect from future damage.

templates.name: Will IGK color cover my grays?
templates.content: Yes. IGK Color is permanent and will cover gray hair. Depending on how resistant your hair is, you may need more time to process. Be sure to read the directions provided on how long you should leave the color on for the best results.

templates.name: How should I layer my IGK products?
templates.content:
Generally, products should be layered in the following order: 

Step 1: Shampoo/conditioner/masques
Step 2: Detanglers, heat protectants, leave-in conditioners
Step 3: Creams, mousses, gels
Step 4: Nourishing oils, serums
Step 5: Dry products like hair sprays and dry volume sprays

However, we know that everyone is different, and we encourage you to try using the products in ways that work best for your hair.

templates.name: Do you ship internationally?
templates.content: At this time, orders placed on igkhair.com are unable to be shipped outside of the Contiguous United States, but please feel free to check back as we are continuously growing as a brand! In the meantime, you may browse the line at Sephora where international shipping is available: https://www.sephora.com/beauty/international-websites

templates.name: Will IGK color damage my hair?
templates.content: The IGK Color formula is designed to be non-damaging. However, if your hair is already damaged (think: dry, fragile ends, easily tangles, brittle, hard to style, etc.), IGK Color may not be able to reverse damage or repair the hair.

templates.name: Why do I need to use the color consultation tool?
templates.content: Think of it like your virtual professional colorist. The questions are meant to mimic a real chat you'd have with an IGK pro about your hair history and desired color results, so we can determine which options are best for you.

templates.name: Do your products offer heat and thermal protection?
templates.content: Heat and thermal protection vary among our products. Please refer to either the product page or the packaging of your favorite products.

templates.name: Why is bamboo extract included in the color formula?
templates.content: Bamboo is the perfect strengthening agent. Rich in silica, it fortifies the cuticle layer, improving color retention and enhancing shine.

templates.name: Do your products contain sulfates?
templates.content: Our products do not contain SLS or SLES, which are surfactant-based sulfates.

templates.name: I have leftover color. Can I save it for touchups?
templates.content: I'm afraid you cannot save leftover hair color for two reasons. When you mix IGK Activate and IGK Color Pigment, the formula begins to oxidize, creating color energy in the bottle. This energy, if stored, can cause the bottle to expand and can create an unintentional (and very colorful) mess. Also, pre-oxidized color cannot be saved and reused as it will not fully color your hair, which may lead to an undesirable result.

templates.name: What is the Antisocial Bond Building Dry Hair Mask and how to use it?
templates.content:
This innovative bond-building spray mask restores a healthy look and feel to dry, 
damaged hair. The lightweight formula provides deep hydration, softens strands, and adds shine, without residue or rinsing. Spray it generously to dry hair in sections, and brush through. Reapply as desired.

templates.name: What is the Blonde Pop Purple Toning Conditioner and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a purple toning, blonde-enhancing conditioner that instantly brightens and neutralizes yellow and brassy tones in blonde and highlighted hair. The moisture-rich formula boosts vibrancy, softness, and shine. Apply it to wet hair, wait 3 minutes, and rinse.

templates.name: What is the Legendary Dream Hair Conditioner and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a multi-benefit, lightweight conditioner that nourishes and adds shine while sealing in moisture, keeping hair smooth, soft, and bouncy. Apply it to wet hair, wait 3 minutes, and rinse.

templates.name: What is the Jet Lag Invisible Dry Shampoo and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a gently cleansing dry shampoo that refreshes the hair and scalp, leaving a silky, undetectable feel. It's perfect for slightly oily strands seeking a quick cleanse without texture. Simply spray it onto roots in sections, wait 30 seconds, and massage into scalp.

templates.name: What is the Beach Club Soft Texture Paste and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a finishing cream that adds piecey definition and separation, without dryness or crunch. Melt it in the palm of your hands, and apply it toward the ends, working upwards to the mid-lengths for desired separation and pieciness.

templates.name: What is the Class of 93 Curl Perfecting Whipped Cream and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a nourishing curl cream, packed with 10 ultra-rich butters and oils, that seals in moisture, intensely softens, and enhances definition. Apply a small amount to clean, wet hair, scrunching upwards, adding more as desired. Air dry or diffuse.

templates.name: What is the Extra Love Volume and Thickening conditioner and how to use it?
templates.content:
It's a volumizing and thickening conditioner that provides fullness and bounce. 
The weightless, hydrating formula gently detangles and gives body to hair. Apply it to wet hair, wait 3 minutes, and rinse.

templates.name: What are the Mixed Feelings Toning Drops and how to use them?
templates.content:
It's a customizable, blonde-brightening, concentrated toner that mixes with any 
conditioner or cream styler to instantly correct brassiness. Dispense three to five drops into any conditioner or cream styler in your palm, mix well, and apply to damp or wet hair.

templates.name: What is the Rich Kid Wave Enhancing Air Dry Cream and how to use it?
templates.content: This effortless air-dry gel cream provides a touchable, piecey texture, lightweight hold, and shine, making it perfect for enhancing natural waves or curl patterns. Apply it evenly to clean, damp hair, finger-comb through, and air dry.

templates.name: What is the Expensive Clear Gloss Topcoat and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a clear gloss top coat treatment that illuminates dull and color-processed hair and provides prismatic-like shine. The ultra-hydrating formula provides high-shine and vibrant dimension to dull hair while also protecting against UV rays to prevent color from fading. After shampooing, apply to wet hair from roots to ends. Let it sit for 3 minutes, comb through and rinse thoroughly. Use one to two time per week in place of your conditioner.

templates.name: What is the Thirsty Girl Leave in Conditioner and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a leave-in conditioner spray that moisturizes, softens, nourishes, and controls frizz. IGK'S Patented Hyaluronic Acid Technology forms a rich moisture barrier for deep hydration and pure coconut milk smooths and strengthens hair to prevent breakage and split ends. Shake it well and spray evenly onto clean, damp hair. Comb through and air dry or style.

templates.name: What is the Direct Flight Multi Tasking Match Dry Shampoo and how to use it?
templates.content: This multitasking dry shampoo absorbs oil, preserves style, and adds light, touchable texture without grit. The oil-absorbing formula lifts dirt and buildup to extend your style while boosting volume and adding texture. Spray it onto roots in sections, wait 30 seconds, and massage until powder disappears.

templates.name: What is the Best Life 100% Plant Nourishing Oil and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a super-concentrated, 100% plant-based hair oil designed to support nourished, healthy-looking hair. Provides daily hydration, smoothness, softness, and heat protectant without silicones or added weight. You can use it every day or as needed. Can be used to blow dry, air-dry, or as a finishing step.

templates.name: What is the Cash In Instant Repair Serum and how to use it?
templates.content:
This clinically-proven treatment serum significantly repairs damage and reduces 
breakage.  The concentrated, lightweight formula features biomimetic bond-building technology to instantly moisturize, mend split ends, provide softness and shine, and protect from heat damage. Apply it generously to hair and follow with styler.

templates.name: Escalation template
templates.content: Thank you, I'll pass this along to my team and I'll come back to you with an update in 24 hrs. Please note that our Client Service team is available Monday to Friday between 9 am and 6pm EST.

templates.name: What is the Mistress Hydrating Hair Balm and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a leave-in conditioner and styler that gives moisture, shine, and smoothness to dry or dehydrated hair, without the weight. Apply it to damp hair and let air dry or blow dry. You can also apply it to dry hair for extra hydration.

templates.name: What is the No Limit Dry Volume & Thickening Spray and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a dry finishing spray that instantly adds touchable, buildable volume and thickness that won't fall flat. This featherlight, buildable formula allows you to layer on as needed for more body and density from roots to ends. Spray it onto dry, styled lengths, scrunching and building to desired thickness.

templates.name: What is the Pay Day Instant Repair Shampoo and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a gently cleansing shampoo, clinically proven to reduce breakage and support strength. Featuring clean bond-building, biomimetic and moisture-rich actives, this cleanser is the first essential solution to restored, healthier-looking hair. Apply it to wet hair, massage it into a lather and rinse.

templates.name: What is the Big Time Volume and Thickening Mousse and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a heat-activated mousse that doubles the volume and thickness without falling flat. This lightweight formula also protects from heat damage. Apply it to clean, damp hair and blow dry.

templates.name: What is the Good Spin Flexible Curl Defining Gelee and how to use it?
templates.content:
It's a hydrating curl gelée that defines, blocks frizz, and adds shine. The flexible, 
medium-hold formula keeps curls soft and crunch-free. Apply it to clean, wet hair, scrunching upwards. Air dry or diffuse.

templates.name: What is the Legendary Dream Hair Shampoo and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a multi-benefit shampoo that adds moisture, shine, bounce, and smoothness while nourishing the scalp for stronger, healthier-looking hair. Apply it to wet hair, lather, and rinse.

templates.name: What is the First Class Charcoal Detox Dry Shampoo and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a deeply cleansing dry shampoo that absorbs oil and odors for clean, refreshed hair between washes. It's perfect for very oily hair and scalp, or post-workout sweat. Simply spray it onto roots in sections, wait 30 seconds, and massage until powder disappears.

templates.name: What is the Extra Love Volume and Thickening shampoo and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a volumizing and thickening shampoo that provides fullness and bounce. The weightless, hydrating formula balances the scalp and gives body to hair. Apply to wet hair, lather, and rinse.

templates.name: What is the Pay Day Instant Repair Conditioner and how to use it?
templates.content:
It's a deeply nourishing conditioner, clinically proven to reduce breakage and 
support strength. Featuring clean bond-building, biomimetic and moisture-rich actives, this cleanser is the first essential solution to restored, healthier-looking hair. Apply it to wet hair, wait 3 minutes, and rinse.

templates.name: What is the Offline 3 Minute Hydration Mask and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a rich hydration mask that restores smoothness and softness in just 3 minutes. This concentrated treatment features a blend of nourishing butters and oils to provide maximum moisture. Apply it to wet hair, wait 3 minutes, comb, and rinse.

templates.name: What is the Color Depositing Mask and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a color-depositing, semi-permanent conditioning hair mask that enhances color intensity, dimension, and shine while providing hydration, softness, and smoothness all in 1 formula. Color lasts up to 10 washes, depending on shade and application, fading naturally with each wash. Apply generously to clean hair and distribute evenly. Leave for one to five minutes on wet hair for a sheer color effect, or 10 to 15 minutes on dry hair for an intense color effect. Rinse thoroughly.

templates.name: What is the L.A. Blonde Treatment Spray and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a purple toning leave-in treatment that instantly neutralizes brass and brightens blonde. The lightweight formula restores hydration and provides 450°F heat protection. Spray it evenly onto clean, damp hair. Comb through and follow with styler.

templates.name: What is Beach Club Bouncy Blowout Cream and how to use it?
templates.content:
This lightweight blowout cream plumps hair and creates full-bodied volume while 
also protecting against thermal heat damage. This silicone-free, non-greasy formula provides long-lasting voluminous results and style memory. Apply it to clean, damp hair. Blow dry in small sections using a round brush.

templates.name: What is the 1800 Hold Me Flexible Working Hairspray and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a flexible, reworkable hairspray that provides a brushable hold with glowing shine. This versatile, heat-protectant formula can be used while styling dry hair, or to set a finished look. Mist over dry hair during and after styling, and build for more hold and shine.

templates.name: What is the CryBaby Smoothing and Finishing serum and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a smoothing and finishing serum that provides 72-hour frizz control and tames flyaways. The weightless oil-in-serum formula imparts a reflective, high-shine finish. Apply to dry, styled hair from mid-lengths to ends.

templates.name: What is the Good Behavior Spirulina Protein Smoothing blowout balm and how to use it?
templates.content:
It's a heat-activated anti-frizz blowout balm that mimics the smoothing effect of a 
keratin treatment while providing 72-hour frizz control and 450°F heat protection. Apply a small amount to wet hair evenly and blow-dry in for smooth results.

templates.name: What is the Blonde Pop Purple Toning Shampoo and how to use it?
templates.content:
It's a purple toning, blonde-enhancing shampoo that instantly brightens and 
neutralizes yellow and brassy tones in blonde and highlighted hair.  The moisture-rich formula boosts vibrancy, softness, and shine. Apply it to wet hair, wait 3 minutes, and rinse.

templates.name: What is the Good Behavior Spirulina Protein Smoothing spray and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a heat-activated smoothing spray that delivers sleek, high-shine results without the damage to mimic the look of a keratin treatment. It provides 24-hour frizz control and 450° F heat protection. Spray it generously over damp hair in sections and blow dry smooth.

templates.name: What is Beach Club Touchable Texture Spray and how to use it?
templates.content: It's a texturizing spray that provides lasting, touchable, beachy definition to all hair textures. There's no crunch, the non-drying formula creates effortless beach hair. Spray it into dry, styled hair evenly along lengths and ends. Build, scrunch and twist for desired results!

templates.name: Rewards / Loyalty points
templates.content: We have a rewards program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://www.igkhair.com/pages/rewards?srsltid=AfmBOor1rgDz5LVC1ZqteqyXtNsWiPufKSKzAgXyueqvPcdrjC0loWax

templates.name: Can I combine loyalty points with other discount codes?
templates.content: Unfortunately, if you are applying points towards a purchase, other discount codes entered at checkout will not work.

templates.name: update rp temp
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.igkhair.com/pages/help-center?hcUrl=%2Fen-US%2Fwhat-is-your-return-policy-293241 and you can start your return here: https://www.igkhair.com/a/return
